final:
// // This module is designed to decrement its count value on each rising edge of the clock when enabled. The counter resets to zero when the reset signal is asserted.
module top_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 0;
    end
    else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to decrement its count value on each rising edge of the clock when enabled. The counter resets to zero when the reset signal is asserted.
